user.title: Select IR transport
user.description: Choose how AeroState will send IR commands to your air conditioner.

broadlink_remote.title: Select Broadlink controller
broadlink_remote.description: Choose the Broadlink remote entity used to send IR commands.

tuya_device.title: Tuya IR Blaster Setup

tuya_confirm.title: Confirm Tuya IR Setup

sensors.title: Link sensors and naming
sensors.description: Optionally link room sensors and set display naming.

validation_result.title: Validation summary
validation_result.description: Status: {status}. Transport OK: {transport_ok}. Validation set available: {set_available}. Supported modes: {supported_modes}. Physically verified modes: {physically_verified_modes}. Experimental modes: {experimental_modes}. Attempted: {attempted}. Error: {error}. Pack notes: {pack_notes}. Limitations: {pack_limitations}.

confirm.title: Confirm setup
confirm.description: Review your selection and create the entry. Verified: {pack_verified}. Notes: {pack_notes}. Limitations: {pack_limitations}.

abort.no_packs_for_brand: No model packs are available for the selected brand.
abort.selected_pack_unavailable: The selected model pack is no longer available.
abort.validation_failed: Validation commands failed. Check logs for details.
abort.already_configured: This controller and model pack are already configured.
abort.no_tuya_packs_available: No Tuya IR packs are available. Add a Tuya pack to packs/tuya/ first.
abort.tuya_set_dp_not_available: LocalTuya localtuya.set_dp service not found. Install and configure LocalTuya integration first.
abort.tuya_pack_not_found: Selected Tuya IR pack is not available.

error.validation_failed: Validation commands failed. Check logs for details.
error.broadlink_entity_required: Choose a Broadlink remote for the Broadlink IR path.
error.tuya_set_dp_not_available: LocalTuya is not installed or localtuya.set_dp service is unavailable.
error.tuya_transport_unavailable: Cannot reach Tuya IR blaster. Check Device ID, Local Key, and IP address.
error.tuya_pack_not_found: Selected Tuya IR pack could not be loaded. Check packs/tuya/ directory.

init.title: Edit AeroState options
init.description: Update controller, model pack, linked sensors, and naming. Notes: {pack_notes}. Limitations: {pack_limitations}.

data.name: Display name
data.tuya_ir_no_ack_mode: Tuya IR: skip power-sensor forced OFF; softer failure messaging
data.tuya_ir_send_blocking: Tuya IR: wait for service completion (recommended)

error.already_configured: Another AeroState entry already uses this controller and model pack.
error.invalid_model_pack: The selected model pack is unavailable or invalid.

missing_remote.title: Configured Broadlink remote is missing
missing_remote.description: AeroState cannot find the configured Broadlink remote entity for this entry.

missing_pack.title: Configured model pack is missing
missing_pack.description: AeroState cannot load the configured model pack for this entry.

invalid_pack.title: Model pack is invalid
invalid_pack.description: AeroState detected invalid capabilities or command structure in the configured model pack.

missing_temp_sensor.title: Linked temperature sensor is missing
missing_temp_sensor.description: AeroState cannot find the configured room temperature sensor.

missing_humidity_sensor.title: Linked humidity sensor is missing
missing_humidity_sensor.description: AeroState cannot find the configured room humidity sensor.

missing_power_sensor.title: Linked power sensor is missing
missing_power_sensor.description: AeroState cannot find the configured power sensor.

command_resolution_failure.title: Command resolution failed
command_resolution_failure.description: AeroState could not resolve or send a command for the requested climate state.

experimental_pack.title: Pack is experimental
experimental_pack.description: The selected model pack is marked as experimental and may not be stable for daily use.

validation_failed.title: Validation failed
validation_failed.description: AeroState validation failed for this installation. Re-run self-test after checking remote and pack settings.

incomplete_command_matrix.title: Command matrix is incomplete
incomplete_command_matrix.description: Transport is available, but the selected pack appears to have missing command branches or temperatures.

tuya_transport_unavailable.title: Tuya IR blaster unreachable
tuya_transport_unavailable.description: AeroState cannot reach the Tuya IR blaster. Check that LocalTuya is installed, the device is online, and the Device ID / Local Key / IP address are correct in Options.

tuya_pack_missing.title: Tuya IR pack missing
tuya_pack_missing.description: The configured Tuya IR pack could not be loaded. The pack may have been removed from packs/tuya/.

run_self_test.name: Run AeroState self-test
run_self_test.description: Run a safe IR self-test sequence against a configured AeroState entry.

profile.name: Test profile
profile.description: basic runs safe pack-driven states; full attempts one additional supported state.
